Where science meets soul — cocktails as art

The Artisan

Crafting liquid
experiences

In the modern cocktail scene, the terms "mixology" and "mixologist" are a regular part of bar vocabulary — being used more and more to describe a style of mixing cocktails and the people who practice it. Subash Shankar exemplifies this distinction at the highest level.

At 38 years old, Subash has carved out a reputation as one of the most inventive mixologists working today. Currently serving as Chief of Bars at the prestigious Alaia Hotel in San Pedro, Belize, he brings molecular technique, theatrical presentation, and an encyclopaedic knowledge of flavour to every creation.

15+
Years Experience
200+
Original Recipes
38
Years Old
∞
Creativity

In Motion

The Work

A gallery of craft

Philosophy

A cocktail is not just a drink — it is a story told in glass, fire, smoke, and flavour.

— Subash Shankar

Disciplines

Areas of mastery

01
🧪

Molecular Mixology

Employing liquid nitrogen, spherification, and culinary science to transform cocktails into multi-sensory theatre that challenges every expectation.

02
🔥

Live Presentation

Mastery of fire, smoke, and live tableside craftsmanship — turning every pour into a performance that guests remember long after the glass is empty.

03
🌿

House Infusions

Crafting bespoke botanical infusions, barrel-aged spirits, and fermented preparations that give each menu a distinct terroir and identity.

04
🎓

Cocktail Education

Delivering immersive masterclasses and mixology workshops for hospitality teams and enthusiasts, elevating the standard of bartending culture wherever he goes.

05
🍹

Menu Architecture

Designing cocktail menus that tell a narrative — from concept and story to flavour balance, presentation, and the guest experience from first glance to last sip.

06
⭐

Bar Leadership

As Chief of Bars at Alaia Hotel Belize, leading teams to operate at the highest standard of luxury hospitality, with an unwavering focus on excellence and innovation.

SUBASH
SHANKAR
